message:
feat(tests): add weighted attribution edge-case and claim-integrity tests

Add 13 edge-case tests to bench_schema.rs validating weighted bottleneck
attribution math (CI bounds, schema version, weighting policy, confidence
method, sample size, downstream consumers). Add claim-integrity tests to
performance_comparison.rs enforcing canonical downstream consumer contract
(bd-3ar8v.6.1/6.2) and weighted-attribution mitigation references.

Beads: bd-3ar8v.2.12.1, bd-3ar8v.2.12.2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
